## Runtime.IRuntimeIngredient.isSugar() method

Returns true if this is a sugar ingredient. When true, sugar-specific properties are available.

**Signature:**

```typescript
isSugar(): this is IRuntimeSugarIngredient;
```
**Returns:**

this is [IRuntimeSugarIngredient](./ts-chocolate.runtime.iruntimesugaringredient.md)
